items.name: hero-basic
items.title: Hero Basic
items.docs:
Payload Kits installs this as a Payload CMS block for the Payload website starter shape.

Complete install with Payload wiring:

```bash
pnpm dlx payload-kit add hero-basic
```

Direct shadcn URL install:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://payload-components.xyz/r/hero-basic.json
```

Namespace install after adding `{"registries":{"@payload-kits":"https://payload-components.xyz/r/{name}.json"}}` to `components.json`:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @payload-kits/hero-basic
```

Direct shadcn installs copy files and shadcn UI dependencies only. Use `payload-kit add hero-basic` when you also want Payload layout registration, `RenderBlocks` wiring, `generate:types`, `generate:importmap`, idempotency, and recovery state handled for you.

items.name: post-card
items.title: Post Card
items.description: shadcn-native Payload post card with image, categories, date, title, and summary.
items.docs:
Payload Kits installs this as a shadcn-native Posts presentation component.

Direct shadcn URL install:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://payload-components.xyz/r/post-card.json
```

Namespace install after adding `{"registries":{"@payload-kits":"https://payload-components.xyz/r/{name}.json"}}` to `components.json`:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @payload-kits/post-card
```

This kit copies frontend component files and shadcn UI dependencies only. It does not patch Payload collection config, `RenderBlocks`, generated types, or admin import maps.
